response.original_title: Exodus USA Helpline Number ⭐ 1-858-423-8635: Complete Guide
response.overview: Official Exodus Support Channels (Crypto Wallet) ⭐ 1-858-423-8635 •	Email: support@exodus.com •	Website & Mobile App: Use the built-in chatbot or support feature on the official Exodus Website or Dial ⭐ 1-858-423-8635. •	Social Media: You can reach out to ExodusAssist on X. •	Important Security Notice: Dial ⭐ 1-858-423-8635, Exodus staff will NEVER ask for your passwords, private keys, secret keys, or sync QR codes.
